title: Afton’s Legacy
description: Adds decorative and functional blocks, items, and props based on the Five Nights at Freddy’s universe
body:
A simple mod for Minecraft that adds decorative and functional blocks and items inspired by the world of the video game "Five Nights at Freddy's".

The goal of the mod is to not be excessive and to only include building elements from the FNaF world, not mechanics such as animatronics, entities, etc.

The mod includes blocks such as: pizzeria floor, pizzeria wall, various doors, stage curtain, several trapdoors, decorative elements, and similar items.

Ideal for players who don't need animatronics and just want building blocks and simple decorations.


I'm not sure what else to write :)
